name: /compliance-remove: removes the matching entry from .claude-tdd-pro/COMPLIANCE-URLS.yaml
command:
mkdir -p .claude-tdd-pro && printf -- '- id: nist-ai-rmf
  name: NIST AI RMF
  url: https://nist.gov
  authoritative_publisher: NIST
  jurisdiction: us-government
  applicable_to: [ai]
  identifier_scheme: nist
  why_authoritative: |
    a
    b
    c
  fetch_frequency: weekly
  legal_review_required: false
  paywalled: false
' > .claude-tdd-pro/COMPLIANCE-URLS.yaml && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/compliance-remove.sh" nist-ai-rmf --catalog "$PWD/.claude-tdd-pro/COMPLIANCE-URLS.yaml" --force && ! grep -q nist-ai-rmf .claude-tdd-pro/COMPLIANCE-URLS.yaml && echo ok 1>&2
